1.name: Accurate
1.rules: Gain +2 to attack rolls made with this arrow

1.name: Explosive
1.rules: On impact, this arrow explodes and deals 2 fire damage to each creature within 5 ft.

1.name: Flaming
1.rules: All attacks with this arrow deal fire damage and ignite flammable objects.

1.name: Healing
1.rules: Instead of dealing damage to allies with this arrow, they heal 1d4 hitpoints instead.

1.name: Radiant
1.rules: All attacks with this arrow deal radiant damage instead.

1.name: Boundy
1.rules: This arrow can bounce off of one surface before it hits its first target.

1.name: Roped
1.rules: After dealing damage to a target, you can either pull yourself to the target or

2.name: Toppling Impact
2.rules: The target must succeed on a DC 12 Strength save or be knocked Prone.

2.name: Pushing Shaft
2.rules: The target must succeed on a DC 12 Strength save or be pushed 10 feet away from you.

2.name: Quick-Draw
2.rules: If you miss with this arrow, you can use a Bonus Action to immediately fire one non-magical arrow.

2.name: Hamstring
2.rules: The target cannot take the Dash or Disengage action until the end of its next turn.

2.name: Distracting Sting
2.rules: The next attack roll made against this target by someone other than you has Advantage.

3.name: Fire Aspect
3.rules: The arrow deals an extra 1d8 Fire damage and ignites flammable objects not being worn.

3.name: Frost Bite
3.rules: The target's speed is halved until the end of its next turn. It cannot take Reactions.

3.name: Cleaving Broadhead
3.rules: If the attack hits, a second creature within 5 feet of the target takes 1d6 Piercing damage.

3.name: Draining Barb
3.rules: The arrow deals an extra 1d4 Necrotic damage; you gain Temporary Hit Points equal to the damage dealt.

3.name: Blinding Flash
3.rules: The target must succeed on a DC 13 Constitution save or be Blinded until the end of its next turn.
